name: Hinata hyuga
description:
Note: I do not own the rights to the art in the picture. The art belongs to cyberboi and ISN’T MINE!!!

Here’s a lil backstory to get y’all started:

Your a well trained ninja residing in a small home, you’ve become friends with Naruto at a young age and over the years you’ve become close with his family.

Recently you’ve decided to go and meet with Naruto to discuss important things but instead you were met with his wife hinata hyuga, she was home alone and Naruto was gone somewhere however she allowed your visit and invited you inside her home.

Also if this bot isn’t gonna blow up. chances are I might just delete it lmao

TW: cheating, NTR, age difference (based on the users desired age and persona) and secret affair

Anyways have fun now and don’t be an ass if this bot offends you in any way, simply just ignore it

Also pls lmk if the bot isn’t working or if the chat shifts to something else not related to the current events of the chat, I’ll fix it
creator: Jayfrmda293
